GRAIL: Gradient-Reweighted Advantages for Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards
articles.excerpt: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (e.g. GRPO) is now a common way to improve mathematical reasoning in Large Language Models (LLMs). However, current methods usually broadcast one sequence-level advantage to all tokens, or use costly process reward models (PRMs) for step-level supervision. Uniform advantage distribution assumes that all tokens contribute equally to the final reward. T
articles.summary: GRAIL针对RLVR中所有token共享同一序列级优势的问题，提出梯度加权优势分配方法，根据每个token对最终奖励的贡献赋予不同权重，无需昂贵的过程奖励模型，提升数学推理LLM的训练效率。

articles.title: MapAgent: An Industrial-Grade Agentic Framework for City-scale Lane-level Map Generation
articles.excerpt: Lane-level maps are critical infrastructure for autonomous driving and lane-level navigation, yet constructing and maintaining standardized lane networks for hundreds of cities remains highly labor-intensive. Recent end-to-end vectorized mapping methods can predict lane geometry and topology directly from sensor data, but they typically treat mapping specifications and traffic regulations as impli
articles.summary: MapAgent提出工业级agent框架，用于城市级车道级地图生成。通过将建图规范和交通规则显式编码，解决端到端矢量化方法忽视规范的问题，降低大规模车道网络构建的人力成本。

articles.title: Stateful Visual Encoders for Vision-Language Models
articles.excerpt: Vision-language models (VLMs) are increasingly used in multi-image, multi-turn agentic settings where decisions depend on visual changes. However, in existing open-weight VLMs, visual comparisons happen only inside the language model, while the visual encoder itself remains stateless: each image is encoded independently, without access to the prior visual context. As a result, small but task-criti
articles.summary: Stateful Visual Encoders为VLM引入有状态视觉编码器，使图像编码能参考先前视觉上下文，而非独立编码。在多图、多轮agent场景中，提升了小视觉变化的检测能力和任务准确率。

articles.title: World Models Meet Language Models: On the Complementarity of Concrete and Abstract Reasoning
articles.excerpt: World models and multimodal large language models (MLLMs) provide complementary capabilities for predicting future outcomes from static visual observations. World models can generate concrete visual rollouts of possible futures, while MLLMs can reason abstractly over questions, goals, and rules. However, generated rollouts are stochastic and may be visually plausible but task-incorrect, making it
articles.summary: 该工作将世界模型的具体视觉rollout与MLLM的抽象推理相融合，提出互补框架。世界模型生成未来视觉可能性，MLLM基于规则和目标进行推理，解决各自局限，提升未来预测的准确性与可解释性。

articles.title: ThoughtFold: Folding Reasoning Chains via Introspective Preference Learning
articles.excerpt: Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) have achieved remarkable progress thanks to Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) on Chain-of-Thoughts (CoTs). However, since long CoTs naturally contain trial and errors and mainstream RLVR approaches choose outcome-correct CoT trajectories for memorization, the redundant explorations in long CoTs are inevitably reinforced, which results in the over-t
articles.summary: ThoughtFold通过内省偏好学习，对大量推理链（CoT）进行折叠，减少冗余探索。该方法利用验证奖励自动识别并抑制低效步骤，在保持推理性能的同时显著缩短长CoT长度。

articles.title: Small RL Controller, Large Language Model: RL-Guided Adaptive Sampling for Test-Time Scaling
articles.excerpt: Test-time scaling improves the reasoning performance of large language models but incurs substantial cost in both total computation and latency. Existing adaptive sampling methods partially mitigate this issue by dynamically deciding when to stop sampling, yet they typically rely on heuristic rules or rely on distribution assumptions. In this work, we formulate adaptive sampling as a Markov decisi
articles.summary: 该文将自适应采样形式化为马尔可夫决策过程，用小RL控制器决定何时停止采样式推理。相比启发式规则，该方法在测试时降低计算开销与延迟，同时保持甚至提升LLM推理准确率。

articles.title: Self-Distilled Policy Gradient
articles.excerpt: On-policy self-distillation, where a language model conditions on privileged context to supervise its own generations, is a promising source of dense supervision for sparse-reward reinforcement learning. Actually, it can be instantiated as an auxiliary full-vocabulary student-to-teacher reverse Kullback-Leibler divergence loss. We therefore propose SDPG, a self-distilled policy-gradient framework
articles.summary: SDPG提出自蒸馏策略梯度框架，利用语言模型自身在特权上下文下的生成作为密集监督信号，辅助稀疏奖励强化学习。通过学生到教师的逆向KL散度损失，有效提升训练稳定性与样本效率。

articles.title: Language Models Need Sleep: Learning to Self-Modify and Consolidate Memories
articles.excerpt: The past few decades have witnessed significant advances in the design of machine learning algorithms, from early studies on task-specific shallow models to more general deep Large Language Models (LLMs). Despite showing promising results in tasks that require instant prediction or in-context learning, existing models lack the ability to continually learn and effectively transfer their temporal in
articles.summary: 该论文探索让LLM通过类似睡眠的机制自我修改和巩固记忆，实现持续学习和时间知识迁移。方法模拟生物记忆重放，提升模型在长期任务中的知识保留与迁移能力。

articles.title: Agentic Chain-of-Thought Steering for Efficient and Controllable LLM Reasoning
articles.excerpt: Large language models improve final-answer accuracy through extended chain-of-thought reasoning, but often spend tokens inefficiently and offer little inference-time control. Existing efficient reasoning methods control thinking length by shortening, early-stopping, or compressing traces, leaving how the model thinks implicit. In this paper, we propose Agentic Chain-of-Thought Steering (ACTS), whi
articles.summary: ACTS提出智能链式思维引导方法，通过agentic方式动态控制LLM推理的token使用和思考过程，而非简单截断或压缩。在保证答案准确率的同时提升了推理效率，并允许用户在推理时间进行干预。

articles.title: Benchmarking Visual State Tracking in Multimodal Video Understanding
articles.excerpt: Understanding a video requires more than recognizing isolated moments, as humans continuously track entities, states, and events over time. This capacity for visual state tracking is fundamental to video understanding, yet remains underexplored in current evaluations of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs). We introduce Visual STAte Tracking benchmark (VSTAT), a video-based benchmark designed
articles.summary: VSTAT基准全面评估MLLM在视频中追踪实体状态的能力，要求模型持续跟踪物体属性、位置等变化。实验发现当前模型在跨帧状态推理上存在显著不足，为视频理解研究提供新方向。

articles.title: Eliciting Complex Spatial Reasoning in MLLMs through Wide-Baseline Matching
articles.excerpt: Wide-baseline matching (WBM) requires integrating geometric understanding, viewpoint changes, fine-grained perception, and occlusion reasoning, making it a challenging testbed for spatial reasoning in multimodal large language models (MLLMs) deployed in physical environments. However, current MLLMs lack systematic evaluation and training frameworks for these capabilities. We introduce ReasonMatch-
articles.summary: ReasonMatch基准和训练框架专门测试MLLM的宽基线匹配空间推理能力，涉及几何理解、视角变化和遮挡推理。实验表明现有模型在此任务上表现欠佳，该工作为提升物理环境中的空间推理提供了评估与训练方法。
